_comment: Supplementary chiết tự components: common phonetic/semantic elements that are NEITHER one of the 214 Kangxi radicals NOR an app-learned kanji, so they can't otherwise render with a Hán-Việt label. Hand-authored. Key = component char, value = { hanViet, meaning }. Used as a fallback resolver in radicals.ts after radicals + app kanji. Reference these chars in decomposition-overrides.json to teach the phonetic of a kanji (e.g. 油 = 氵 + 由).
